title: Medication Safety & Error Prevention
description: Medication errors cause preventable patient harm every day. This course equips you with the mindset, skills, and tools to interrupt error chains before they reach patients.
what_youll_learn: Identify the most common medication error types and the system factors that contribute to them
Apply Tall Man lettering, barcode checking, and independent double-check procedures in dispensing
Recognise high-alert medications and LASA drug pairs requiring extra caution
Complete a near-miss or incident report accurately and constructively
Conduct a basic root cause analysis of a dispensing error and recommend preventive changes
